§ 01Transaction Overview

Dear {{cpaName}},

This letter confirms your firm’s role as the certified public accountant for {{companyName}} in connection with its planned Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) transaction. Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. (“Forhemit”) is serving as the transaction stewardship coordinator for this engagement.

Transaction Summary
{{companyName}}
{{industry}}
100% ESOP — new plan
{{entityType}}
{{expectedCloseDate}}
{{ref}}
§ 02CPA Role & Responsibilities

Your firm will serve a critical role throughout the transaction and post-close stewardship. The key responsibilities include:

A.§1042 Election Coordination. Advising the seller on the Qualified Replacement Property (QRS) election mechanics, reinvestment window (60-day rule), basis implications, and coordination with the closing timeline.
B.QofE Data Provision. Providing financial statements, working papers, and normalization adjustments to the independent QofE (Quality of Earnings) appraiser retained by the ESOP trustee.
C.Tax Return Preparation. Preparing or coordinating federal and state tax returns for the company, the seller, and the ESOP trust for the transaction year and subsequent periods.
D.Entity Conversion Support. {{#if requiresConversion}}Advising on the {{entityType}}-to-C-Corp conversion, including tax elections (check-the-box, §351), and coordinating with ERISA counsel on timing.{{else}}No entity conversion is required for this transaction.{{/if}}
E.Ongoing Consultation. Providing tax and financial guidance during the ESOP’s first plan year, including contribution timing, allocation methodology, and compliance reporting.
Independence Note: Your firm’s engagement is with {{companyName}} and its owner(s). Forhemit is not a party to the CPA engagement and does not direct your professional judgment. Any requests from the ESOP trustee or trustee’s financial advisor for working papers or data will be coordinated through you.
§ 03Document Requests

To support the transaction and the QofE process, we request the following items be provided to the independent QofE appraiser and Forhemit as coordinated:

1.Federal and state tax returns — three most recent years for the company and its owners
2.Audited or reviewed financial statements — three most recent fiscal years
3.Interim financial statements — current year-to-date (through most recent month-end)
4.General ledger detail — supporting working papers and account reconciliations
5.Normalization adjustments schedule — owner compensation, one-time items, non-recurring expenses
6.Accounts receivable aging and bad debt history
7.Fixed asset schedule with depreciation detail
8.Debt schedule — all outstanding loans, lines of credit, and seller notes
Timing: Please provide these items within {{docDeliveryDays}} business days of this confirmation. The QofE appraiser will contact you directly to schedule a working session to review the materials.
§ 04Timeline & Milestones

The transaction follows a structured gate system. The key milestones relevant to your role are:

A.Gate 1 — Capital Committed. SBA lender indication of interest received. Document delivery window opens for CPA.
B.Gate 2 — Valuation Confirmed. Independent appraisal completed. CPA provides normalization adjustments and working papers to QofE appraiser. §1042 election planning begins.
C.Gate 3 — Operations Cleared. All financial and operational due diligence complete. CPA confirms readiness for closing tax filings.
D.Gate 4 — Legal Clearance. All legal and financial conditions satisfied. CPA coordinates closing tax package and §1042 filing timeline with seller.
E.Closing. Transaction closes. CPA receives closing package for tax return preparation and §1042 election filing.
F.Post-Close — First Plan Year. CPA prepares ESOP trust tax return, company contribution calculations, and coordinates with plan administrator.
Expected close date: {{expectedCloseDate}}. We will keep you informed of any timeline changes that affect your deliverables.
§ 05Contact

For questions about this engagement or the transaction, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}

Please reference the above number in all correspondence related to this transaction.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
California Public Benefit Corporation
Authorized Representative
